---
title: ""
output: html_document
---

<style type="text/css">
.title {
  display: none;
}

#getting-started img {
  margin-left: 10px;
}

</style>

<div class="row" style="padding-top: 100px;">
<div class="col-sm-6">

**Laura Roldan-Gomez**

email: <lr480@exeter.ac.uk>

Pronouns: She/Her

PhD in Advanced Quantitative Methods

[Centre for Computational Social Science](https://www.exeter.ac.uk/research/centres/computational-social-science/)

University of Exeter

Clayden, Streatham Rise, Exeter EX4 4PE

UK


</div>
<div class="col-sm-6">

### 
<iframe src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Clayden+Building+Streatham+Rise+Exeter+EX4+4PE&output=embed" width="350" height="250" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy"></iframe>
